ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition To Appoint A Successor Administrator.
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Continued To Mar-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Thomson for Linda Bommerscheim.

Mr. Thomson stated that he needed additional time due the condition of the administrator, problems in collecting estate taxes, and stated that he was in communication with the sister in Guam. The matter was continued to March 4, 2009 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Bobby Mann.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Jan-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Thomson for the Administrator.

Mr. Thomson stated that this was a troubled case, that the Administrator was subject to a Conservatorship, that almost all of the assets had been distributed, that there were taxes due, and that there was a collection problem. In addition, he stated that the sister of the decendent received assets through a joint tenancy account and she has not paid the taxes. The Court advised counsel to file a petition to have someone else serve as administrator. The matter was continued to January 7, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R.Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Benjamin Kilgore (Counsel for Linda Bommerschein, Personal Representative).

Mr. Kilgore appeared to advise the court of the status of the accounting and to request a continuance of the status hearing for the same. While the Court granted the request and continued the matter to January 17, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, the Court also ordered sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day for every day that the accounting is not filed after January 17, 2007.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722 ; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.
